message:
test: add schema parity test for wisps vs issues table column drift

Adds three tests to catch schema drift at CI time:
- TestSchemaParityIssuesVsWisps: asserts issues and wisps have identical columns
- TestSchemaParityAuxiliaryTables: asserts auxiliary table column names match
- TestMigrations004And005Together: verifies both migrations run and dolt_ignore works

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/onyx
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
